name: HVAC technicians processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For HVAC technicians processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of work orders into invoices instead of using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual invoicing leads to delayed payments and cash flow gaps.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual invoicing leads to delayed payments and cash flow gaps.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HVAC technicians processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of work orders into invoices instead of using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual invoicing using spreadsheets or paper forms

one_liner: For HVAC technicians processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of work orders into invoices instead of using spreadsheets.
